allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; lines=[json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; [print\(l['timestamp'], l['level'], l['message']\) for l in lines if l['level'] in \('ERROR','WARN'\) and 'auth' in l['message'].lower\(\) or 'prisma' in l['message'].lower\(\) or 'database' in l['message'].lower\(\) or 'callback' in l['message'].lower\(\)]")
